_comment: Contexte pre-calcule par le director en debut de cycle. Lu par les agents a la place de tous les docs.
focus: T050 run_anam + T049 Ogham unlock at rep50 + T051 landes_bruyere batch3

selected_tasks.title: Add run_anam counter to RunState, reset on startRun(), increment alongside meta.anam. RunSummary shows run_anam (this run) + meta.anam (total).
When faction rep crosses 50 threshold, unlock corresponding branch Ogham. Show toast 'Ogham [name] deverrouille'. Wire into addReputation() in Store.ts.
20 landes_bruyere batch3 cards, niamh>=35% (7+/20 options), druides<=3, HEAL_LIFE<=5. Append to public/data/cards.json.

store_analysis.RunState_needs: add 'anamThisRun: number' field, reset to 0 in buildDefaultRun()
store_analysis.addAnam_current: increments meta.anam only — must also increment run.anamThisRun
store_analysis.addReputation_current: updates run.factions + meta.factionRep — must check threshold crossing and unlock Ogham
store_analysis.unlock_logic: if previous_rep < 50 AND new_rep >= 50: unlock tier1 Ogham for that faction (if not already unlocked); dispatch toast via window event or callback

changes: addAnam(amount): also set run: { ...s.run, anamThisRun: s.run.anamThisRun + amount }
RunSummary.ts: show anamThisRun (earned this run) + meta.anam (lifetime total)

t049_brief.action: if ogham not in s.meta.oghamsUnlocked: add to oghamsUnlocked + oghamsEquipped; dispatch CustomEvent 'ogham_unlocked' with detail {oghamId, oghamName}
t049_brief.toast: main.ts or HUD.ts — listen for 'ogham_unlocked' event, show toast 'Ogham [nom] deverrouille' for 3s

t051_brief.themes: niamh-heavy landes batch3: fae encounters on the heath, will-o-wisp guides, threshold crossings, enchanted moors, fairy rings, mist paths leading to faerie, niamh appearing as guide or trickster, boundary places between worlds, golden light over purple heather, enchanted springs hidden in bracken
